notes: Murnaghan fallback: B0_prime=30.0 exceeded [4,20] bound at ±1000 atm. 3-direction deform used. B_dyn (volume fluctuation) = 5.28 GPa is diagnostic only — glassy NPT volume fluctuations are unreliable for K. Deform K_mean in exp range [3.0,4.5] GPa. y-direction shows negative G/E (C12>C11), indicating residual anisotropy in that direction; K_y is still physically reasonable as isotropic K estimator. Isotropy delta 8.44% < 20% gate.
